detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DisputeGameFactory.create(GameType,Claim,bytes) (src/dispute/DisputeGameFactory.sol#147-224):
	External calls:
	- proxy_.initialize{value: msg.value}() (src/dispute/DisputeGameFactory.sol#215)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _disputeGames[uuid] = id (src/dispute/DisputeGameFactory.sol#221)
	DisputeGameFactory._disputeGames (src/dispute/DisputeGameFactory.sol#71) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DisputeGameFactory.create(GameType,Claim,bytes) (src/dispute/DisputeGameFactory.sol#147-224)
	- DisputeGameFactory.games(GameType,Claim,bytes) (src/dispute/DisputeGameFactory.sol#112-124)
